codeReview.summary: Implementation covers all VAL-ADMIN-* assertions. View/Edit mode toggle works correctly, permission-based UI restricts non-admin users appropriately, and multi-location status dashboard displays connection statuses. Code quality is good with proper TypeScript types.

issues.description: isValidPathFormat function only validates format (UNC pattern or drive letter) but does not verify path accessibility. This is acceptable per VAL-SYNC-001 which expects validation of path format, not reachability. The sync system handles connectivity separately.

The saveConfig function appears to accept any path format without accessibility validation. Connection status is tracked separately via connectionStatuses. This is a design choice aligned with VAL-ADMIN-002 which validates 'path format', not reachability.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation uses user?.role from useAuth() context for permission checks, not the App-level isAdmin state. This is the correct approach since it uses actual authentication data. However, AGENTS.md documents an 'isAdmin' admin mode toggle that appears to be a separate development convenience feature (for DevTools access) rather than the production role check.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SyncSettingsPage.tsx:20 uses 'const isAdmin = user?.role === "Administrator"' for permission checks. App.tsx uses 'isAdmin' state for F12 DevTools toggle only. The Navbar and SyncStatusBar receive user prop from App.tsx which gets it from useAuth().

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the frontend-worker skill procedure correctly. Transcript shows: Read mission/AGENTS.md/validation-contract → Explore codebase structure → Implement features → Run typecheck/lint/build → Commit. All verification steps were completed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows worker invoked mission-worker-base skill, read all required docs, explored SyncContext, Navbar, SyncStatusBar, and implemented changes in correct sequence. No deviations from skill procedure noted.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used standard commands from services.yaml: npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm run build, npm run test. No additional services were started.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification shows all commands used are defined in services.yaml commands section.

summary: Implementation of admin-features is complete and passes all VAL-ADMIN-* assertions. The View/Edit mode toggle allows admins to switch between read-only (View mode for remote approval) and edit modes. Permission-based UI correctly hides Sync/User Management options for non-admin users in Navbar, restricts settings button in SyncStatusBar, and shows 'Mode Tampilan (View Only)' indicator in SyncSettingsPage for non-admin users. The multi-location status dashboard shows all configured module statuses with connected/disconnected indicators. All changes compiled successfully with npm run typecheck, lint, and build passing.
